title: Festuca duvalii
taxonomy: Festuca duvalii is classified within the family Poaceae. This family is commonly known as the grass family, which comprises various species of grasses. Festuca duvalii is further classified within the subfamily Pooideae. The genus Festuca is a group of grasses that are typically perennial and native to temperate regions.
